title: Classified Feedback
description: Result of LLM feedback classification. Written by analyzing phase.

classification.description: product-change: fix/change specific product. global-learning: update global heuristic. domain-learning: update domain heuristic. personal-preference: add to taste fingerprint. direction: strategic guidance for vision.

dimension.description: What aspect of quality this feedback addresses

confidence.description: Classification confidence. Below 0.7 triggers Slack confirmation.

derived_heuristic.description: If classification is global-learning or domain-learning, the derived Library entry

derived_fingerprint.description: If classification is personal-preference, the derived taste fingerprint entry

needs_confirmation.description: True if confidence < 0.7 — analyzer should ask for Slack confirmation
